# Contact

Need help with Sami?

- **Email** — [support@sami.team](mailto:support@sami.team)
- **Website** — coming soon
- **Discord** — coming soon

## Before you contact us

To help us troubleshoot faster, include:

- App version and OS
- What you were trying to do
- Error text (if any)
- Relevant logs from **Settings → Logs & Diagnostics**
